response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical versatility and leadership in distributed systems, real-time applications, and AI-agent tooling at re:cinq, but lacks direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production, fintech infrastructure, or regulated environments. His background in event-driven platforms (GISCollective, Sociomantic) and AI-agent frameworks (MCP, tools at re:cinq) is promising but not explicitly aligned with the fintech/agentic-AI CTO role's core requirements. Leadership scale (teams up to ~10-15) falls short of the 20+ target.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time applications (e.g., Sociomantic's millions of requests/sec)
Active contribution to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, code generators at re:cinq) and hands-on experience with agentic workflows
Strong engineering leadership in scaling teams and promoting disciplined practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development at RIDE Capital)
concerns: No direct experience with fintech-specific systems (credit risk, payment flows, embedded finance) or regulatory compliance in financial contexts
Limited scale-up experience leading teams beyond ~15 engineers (falls short of 20+ target for this role)
Scarce evidence of architecting model-agnostic multi-agent systems with production-scale feedback loops or observability for auditable AI decisions
